dialogos.texto_en: (What are Itsuki and Nino doing there?)
I can't take it anymore...\nPlease leave me alone...
Why are you being so dramatic?\nCome on, if there's something you want,\njust say it.
Oooh, thank you...
(Itsuki looks exhausted.\n Come to think of it,\n she seemed pretty tired earlier too.)
Hey, what happened?
Oh, Futaro.\nItsuki, she's just a little tired.
A little tired?
Well... I went swimming with Yotsuba,\nbut she was way faster than I expected...
You pushed yourself too hard\nand got annihilated, right?
So that's what happened, huh.
You should have slowed down and find your own pace.
But I was fine while I was swimming.\nAs soon as I got out of the water,\nmy body felt heavy.
Ah, yeah, it happens.\nAs long as your body is in motion, you're not going to notice \nthe fatigue, but as soon as you stop it catches up to you.
I felt so excited because of the trip, but yeah, I've definitely \noverdone it and I need to calm down a bit...
What happens in Okinawa stays in Okinawa.\nJust don't go overboard, okay?
And that goes for you too...
Huh? Me?
Oh, it's nothing.\nPlease pretend you didn't hear anything.
I heard it loud and clear.\nWhen did I go overboard?
For example: making a heart mark with Nino\nat Tinu Beach...
Okay, okay! Don't bring that up.\nIt's embarrassing just thinking about it...!
But you two already went too far, right?
No, we didn't go overboard. It's just a wonderful memory.\nRight, Futaro?
Y-yeah, a great memory.
...That's just like the two of you.
What? What's wrong?
Is Raiha alright?\nIsn't she tired?
Yotsuba was looking after her,\nand she was using a float,\nso she seemed to be fine.
Is that so.\nEven for us trying to keep up with Yotsuba \nwould be an impossible feat.
Even Yotsuba would be concerned about Raiha-chan's \nwell-being.
On the other hand,\nshe probably thought Itsuki could keep up with her.
Oooh...\nThe shame...
Ah!
What? What's wrong?
This scenery really gets you pumped.\nIt's a rare sight to behold.
Even someone as serious as you, Itsuki,\nwould go wild in a place like this, huh.
That's nonsense! Well, it's true that I felt excited, \nbut I didn't go wild...
Once you can't make sound judgments,\nyou're already going wild.
Wait what?
Usually, you wouldn't push yourself too hard\njust because of Yotsuba.
Oooh...
Ah!
What? What's wrong?
Sorry for disturbing you two, I know I'm in the way.
Huh?
Please, take your time and enjoy yourselves.\nI'll excuse myself.
Itsuki, you don't need to worry about us.
Oh, and your legs are shaking.
But...
Take care of yourself first instead of worrying about us.
...Thank you guys.
I'll buy some drinks for us. Wait here.
Futaro, please take care of Itsuki.
Yeah.
...You both have changed a lot since we arrived in Okinawa.
Huh? Really?
Well, you seem to be more at ease now,\nit's almost like you have more room to breathe.
I'm not at ease at ALL...
(Do I really look that composed?\n I'm still not at ease.)
I can say it now, but there was a time last year\nwhen I didn't know what to do.
At the school festival, you gave us the answer \nwe have been waiting for...
After six months of ups and downs with Nino and the others,\nwe finally get together.
I don't want you to know that,\nbut I just had to tell you.
Is that so?
Uesugi-kun,\nplease take care of Nino.
Of course. You can count on me.
